SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Visitng Judge David Flinn, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

Appellants:Bradley Roberts and Branda Marroquin appear with counsel Margaret DeMatteo of Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Respondent:400 W 22ND Corp. appears by Thomas Iveli, president of Corp with counsel Kevin P. Greenquist.
Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Visiting Judge Flinn.

Tomas Iveli examines by counsel Greenquist;

EXHR (1) LEASE AGREEMENT
EXHR (2) COPY OF CHECK
EXHR (3) COPY OF CHECK
EXHR (4) NORCAL HOLDINGS LETTER CONCERNING PRIOR SMALL CLAIMS CASE (UNCONDITIONALLY RECEIVED)
EXHR (5) SEPT 17TH, 2013 LETTER (UNCONDITIONALLY RECEIVED)
EXHR (6) JAN 25,2012 LETTER TO APPELLANT
EXHR (7) JAN 24,2013 LETTER TO APPELLANT
EXHR (8) RETURNED CERTIFICATION OF MAIL

Tomas Iveli Cross Examines by counsel Margaret DeMatteo.

EXHA (A) JAN 24,2013 NORCAL HOLDINGS LETTER
EXHA (B) APPELANT'S BANK STATEMENT
EXHA (C) E-MAIL TO MR. IVELI/LATE PAYMENT NOTICE

Tomas Iveli Examines by counsel Greenquist. Tomas Iveli responds to Judge Flinn's questions.
Branda Marrquin examines by counsel DeMatteo and cross examins by counsel Greenquist; Redirect by counsel DeMatteo to Branda Marrquin; cross examins by counsel Greenquist.
Counsel DeMatteo Bradley Roberts and cross examins by counsel Greenquist.

Counsel Greenquist waived closing argument; closing argument by counsel DeMatteo.

10:40am
Matter is sumitted. Newly evidence is retained.
